Nitime: timeseries analysis for neuroscience data

name: nitime

about.summary: Nitime: timeseries analysis for neuroscience data
Nitime: timeseries analysis for neuroscience data

raw_meta_yaml:
schema_version: 1

context:
  name: nitime
  version: 0.12

package:
  name: ${{ name|lower }}
  version: ${{ version }}

source:
  url: https://pypi.org/packages/source/${{ name[0] }}/${{ name }}/${{ name }}-${{ version }}.tar.gz
  sha256: 6c0ddf55d390243590b72c1ddc88ad8144223c55d0525b05a9e66cc4cbde5e91

build:
  number: 1
  script: ${{ PYTHON }} -m pip install . -vv --no-deps --no-build-isolation

requirements:
  build:
    - if: build_platform != target_platform
      then: python
    - if: build_platform != target_platform
      then: cross-python_${{ target_platform }}
    - if: build_platform != target_platform
      then: cython
    - if: build_platform != target_platform
      then: numpy
    - setuptools_scm
    - ${{ compiler('c') }}
    - ${{ stdlib("c") }}
  host:
    - python
    - cython
    - numpy
    - setuptools_scm
    - setuptools
    - pip
  run:
    - python
    - matplotlib-base
    - networkx
    - nibabel
    - scipy

tests:
  - python:
      imports:
        - nitime
        - nitime.algorithms
        - nitime._utils
  - requirements:
      run:
        - pip
        - pytest
    script:
      - pip check
      - pytest --pyargs nitime

about:
  summary: "Nitime: timeseries analysis for neuroscience data"
  license: BSD-3-Clause
  license_file: LICENSE
  homepage: http://nipy.org/nitime

extra:
  recipe-maintainers:
    - arokem
    - ocefpaf
    - effigies

about.summary: Nitime: timeseries analysis for neuroscience data
